name: diagGetP2Extended, diagSetP2Extended
title: diagGetP2Extended, diagSetP2Extended
syntax: long diagGetP2Extended (); // form 1: deprecated. Is equivalent to form 2 with source value 2.
long DiagGetP2Extended(char ecuQualifier[], long isTester, dword source); // form 4
description: Returns the P2 extended timeout from the selected source, or sets it to the specified value.

parameters.description: Resets P2ex to its preset value.
Sets P2ex to the value (in ms).

parameters.name: Note If "Response Pending" handling is deactivated, CANoe forwards these responses to CAPL as negative responses. Otherwise the P2ex timer is automatically started and the final response or a timeout is reported.

parameters.description: Currently active value, i.e. the value originally set or last set from CAPL.
Value stored at the selected interface in the description's document.
Value configured in the configuration dialog for the description.

parameters.name: Note Basic diagnostic devices do not have an interface defined in a description, therefore source=1 will return the value set at the configuration (source=2).
ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.
The node asking for the communication parameter is an ECU simulation.
The node asking for the communication parameter is a tester.

return: Error code or time in ms for DiagGetP2Extended.
availability: 7.5 SP2 8.0 SP3: form 1 replaced by form 2 9.0 SP3: from 4
5.1 8.0 SP3: form 1 replaced by form 2 9.0 SP3: form 4
